SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Record Class FireworkBuilder

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.FireworkBuilder
Record Components:
firework - is the ItemStack to be customized. Must have FireworkMeta.
public record FireworkBuilder(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack firework) extends Record
A builder for creating and modifying firework ItemStacks in Bukkit. Provides methods to customize firework effects and properties.

  • Constructor Details

    • FireworkBuilder

      public FireworkBuilder(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack firework)
      Constructs a FireworkBuilder.
      Parameters:
      firework - the firework ItemStack must not be null or AIR and must have FireworkMeta.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the firework is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if the firework is AIR.
      IllegalStateException - if the firework does not have FireworkMeta.

  • Method Details

    • clearEffects

      public FireworkBuilder clearEffects()
      Clears all effects from the firework.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining.

    • effects

      public List<org.bukkit.FireworkEffect> effects()
      Gets all effects applied to the firework.
      Returns:
      a list of FireworkEffects.

    • effect

      public org.bukkit.FireworkEffect effect(int index)
      Gets the effect at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the effect.
      Returns:
      the FireworkEffect at the given index.

    • numberOfEffects

      public int numberOfEffects()
      Gets the number of effects on the firework.
      Returns:
      the number of effects.

    • power

      public int power()
      Gets the power level of the firework.
      Returns:
      the power level.

    • hasEffects

      public boolean hasEffects()
      Checks if the firework has any effects.
      Returns:
      true if the firework has effects, false otherwise.

    • hasPower

      public boolean hasPower()
      Checks if the firework has a power level set.
      Returns:
      true if the firework has a power level, false otherwise.

    • removeEffect

      public FireworkBuilder removeEffect(int index)
      Removes the effect at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the effect to remove.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining.

    • power

      public FireworkBuilder power(int power)
      Sets the power level of the firework.
      Parameters:
      power - the power level to set.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
